forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower on the western slopes, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the west, slight chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h before dawn. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly in the early morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely at night. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly in the early morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog near the eastern border in the early morning. Medium chance of showers in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the early morning then tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection 11:10am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending south to southwesterly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog near the eastern border in the early morning. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Clear. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of the ranges. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker, most likely in the afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h before dawn then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog west of the ranges. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog on and east of the ranges. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Nullarbor, slight chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the early morning. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the west coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection 11:50am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Clear. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the far west, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Clear. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Sunny. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then tending east to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
